hero.headline: The oil stains that *wouldn't budge*? Gone.
hero.subheadline: Derek's soft wash system removes what your DIY pressure washer can't touch. Pool decks, driveways, roofs — one call gets it done.

services_section.label: THE CLEAN
services_section.heading: Every surface, every stain
services_section.subheading: Soft wash, pressure wash, and the right approach for each job

services.title: House Washing
services.description: Soft wash system that cleans without damage. Soffits, siding, and full exterior cleaning.

services.title: Driveway & Sidewalk Cleaning
services.description: Oil stains, rust marks, and buildup removed. Concrete and paver restoration.

services.title: Roof Soft Washing
services.description: Gentle cleaning that removes algae and stains without damaging shingles.

services.title: Pool Deck Cleaning
services.description: Non-slip surface restoration. Removes algae, dirt, and weathering safely.

services.title: Fence Cleaning
services.description: Vinyl, wood, and composite fence restoration. Any length, any condition.

about.heading: Derek shows up and gets it done
about.body: Melbourne pressure washing that actually removes the stains you couldn't. Real results, upfront pricing, and we fit you into the schedule fast.

reviews.name: Sherry S.
reviews.text: For perfectionists and clean freaks who want that new house look in one day. Derek knew exactly what I needed and delivered.

reviews.name: Brandon B.
reviews.text: Derek fit me into his schedule quickly and soft washed my roof perfectly. Professional, efficient, amazing price.

reviews.name: Decorative P.
reviews.text: The rust stains I couldn't remove with any product or pressure washer were completely gone. Highly recommend Derek.

service_areas.label: SERVICE AREA
service_areas.heading: Covering the Space Coast
service_areas.subheading: Professional pressure washing throughout Brevard County

cta.heading: Ready to see those stains disappear?
cta.body: Free quotes, fast scheduling, and results that'll make you wonder why you waited. Derek's already helped 110+ neighbors get their clean back.
